name: 1 GM Imipenem And Cilastatin Injection IP
about: 1 GM Imipenem And Cilastatin Injection IP is a liquid drug type injection that is manufactured in India. It is used to treat severe bacterial infections in the body and should only be taken as per the doctors suggestion. The dosage of this injection is 1GM and it should be stored in a cool place. This injection contains Imipenem and Cilastatin which are antibiotics that work together to prevent the growth of bacteria. This injection is available for export, supply, and trade.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 1 GM Imipenem And Cilastatin Injection IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of this injection is 1GM and should only be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: How should I store this injection?
faq.a: This injection should be stored in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness.

faq.q: What is the drug type of this injection?
faq.a: This injection belongs to the drug type of antibiotics.

faq.q: What are the active ingredients of 1 GM Imipenem And Cilastatin Injection IP?
faq.a: The active ingredients of this injection are Imipenem and Cilastatin.

faq.q: Is this injection available for export, supply, and trade?
faq.a: Yes, this injection is available for export, supply, and trade.
